title: Surgeon Vacancy at Merck India Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Merck India Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Merck India Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Nagpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Merck India Ventures Solutions:
Merck India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Merck India Ventures Solutions!
